title: High stakes battle in Sakra as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Sakra. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Women voters of Sakra demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Sakra has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Sakra triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Sakra, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Sakra promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
